steps.title: Notice repeated recalculation
steps.content: The sentence after the blank says that as decades passed, new calculations revealed increasingly precise coordinates while the prime meridian stayed unchanged. The transition must capture that repeated pattern across time.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals a specific example, but the sentence describes a recurring pattern. Choice B signals purposeful action toward a goal, which is not present. Choice D signals concession, but the sentence continues the historical pattern. The answer is C.
